name: web_scraper
description: Fetches and extracts readable text content from a webpage. Returns the page title, main text, and links. Use this to read web pages, documentation, articles or any URL.

parameters.url: The full URL of the webpage to scrape (must start with http:// or https://)
parameters.search_query: When summary mode is active, tell the summariser what specific information to extract from the page. Be specific.

returns: Extracted text content of the page, suitable for reading and referencing
